figures.caption: TABLE II SUCCESS RATE (%) COMPARISON: BASELINE VS. HEALTH-CONDITIONED MODEL

TABLE III PER-TASK SUCCESS RATE (%) UNDER ALL JOINT MALFUNCTIONS ON LIBERO-SPATIAL (T0–T9). B = BASELINE, O = OURS. J1 w=0.9 AND J3 w=0.9 OMITTED (BOTH MODELS 0% ON ALL TASKS). BOLD INDICATES OUR MODEL OUTPERFORMS THE BASELINE.

Fig. 1. Health-conditioned VLA architecture. The Health Projector (orange) maps the 7D health vector into the model’s latent space and adds it to the proprioceptive features. Only the Health Projector and action queries are trained; all other components remain frozen.
